Title: Verify shop page loads and displays all products correctly
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to home page (Shop)
2. Observe the product listing displayed
Expected Result: Shop page loads successfully. Products are displayed in a 4 column grid with product image, product name and price visible for each product.
Actual Result: Shop page loads successfully. Products are displayed in a 4-column grid with images, names, and prices visible for each product.

Title: Verify shop page shows the correct total number of products
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to home page (Shop)
2. Observe the results count at the top of the page
Expected Result: The displayed product count accurately matches the number of products available in the catalog and the products shown on the page.
Actual Result: The displayed product count accurately matches the number of products available in the catalog and the products shown on the page.

Title: Verify Add to cart button is displayed for simple products on the shop page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to home page
2. Observe the buttons displayed under simple products
Expected Result: Add to cart button is displayed under each simple product.
Actual Result: Add to cart button is displayed under all the simple products.

Title: Verify Select options button is displayed for variable products on the shop page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the buttons displayed under variable products
Expected Result: Select options button is displayed under variable products allowing users to choose options before adding to cart.
Actual Result: Select options button is displayed under variable products and links to the product detail page or opens options for selection.

Title: Verify "SALE" badge and discounted price are displayed for sale products on the shop page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Observe products marked as being on sale
2. Check for the SALE badge and pricing displayed
Expected Result: The SALE! badge is displayed on sale products. Original price is crossed out and the discounted price is shown next to it.
Actual Result: The SALE! badge is displayed on sale products. Original price is crossed out and the discounted price is shown next to it.

Title: Verify that the shop page displays all products on the first page and one product on second page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Count the products displayed on the first page
2. Navigate to the next page
3. Count the products displayed on that page
Expected Result: The first page displays the maximum number of products configured for a single page. The second page displays the remaining products in the catalog.
Actual Result: The first page displays the configured maximum number of products per page. The second page displays the remaining products correctly.

Title: Verify that clicking page 2 navigates to the second page of the shop
Preconditions: User is on first page of the shop
Test Steps:
1. Click the next page button in the pagination controls
2. Observe the URL and displayed products
Expected Result: User is navigated to the second page of the product listing. The URL updates accordingly and the displayed products correspond to the second page of results.
Actual Result: User is navigated to the second page of the product listing; URL updates and products shown are correct for page 2.

Title: Verify that clicking the back arrow on the second page returns the user to the first page
Preconditions: User is on second page of the shop
Test Steps:
1. Click the previous page button in the pagination controls
2. Observe the displayed products
Expected Result: User is navigated back to the first page of the product listing. The URL updates accordingly and the first set of products is displayed.
Actual Result: User was navigated back to the first page; URL updated and first page products are displayed.

Title: Verify that the simple product detail page displays all required elements
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click on a simple product
2. Observe all elements on the product detail page
Expected Result: Product detail page displays all required product information, including product name, price, product description, quantity selector, Add to Cart button, and relevant tabs/sections.
Actual Result: Product detail page displays product name, price, description, quantity selector, Add to Cart button and tabs; all required elements are present.

Title: Verify that the breadcrumb navigation is displayed correctly on the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Observe the breadcrumb at the top of the page
2. Click each breadcrumb link
Expected Result: Breadcrumb navigation is displayed correctly and reflects the user's path to the current product. All breadcrumb links are clickable except for the current page.
Actual Result: Breadcrumb navigation is displayed correctly and links navigate to the respective pages; current page is not clickable.

Title: Verify that the product image zoom works on the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click the magnifying glass zoom icon on the product image
2. Observe the result
Expected Result: Product image opens in a zoomed/lightbox view.
Actual Result: The product image zooms when hovered and opens a larger/lightbox view when clicked.

Title: Verify that the previous and next product navigation arrows work on the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click the left arrow to go to the previous product
2. Observe the product that loads
3. Click the right arrow to go to the next product
4. Observe the product that loads
Expected Result: Left arrow navigates to the previous product. Right arrow navigates to the next product.
Actual Result: Left arrow navigates to the previous product and right arrow navigates to the next product as expected.

Title: Verify that the product description tab displays the correct content
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Description tab
2. Observe the content displayed
Expected Result: Description tab expands and displays the product description text correctly.
Actual Result: Description tab displays the product description; where issues were observed the tab displayed inaccurate or mismatched text (needs correction).

Title: Verify that the Additional information tab is displayed on the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Additional information tab
2. Observe the content displayed
Expected Result: Additional information tab expands and displays relevant product details (e.g., dimensions, weight, attributes).
Actual Result: Additional information tab opens and displays the relevant product details.

Title: Verify that the Reviews tab is displayed on the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Reviews tab
2. Observe the content displayed
Expected Result: Reviews tab expands and displays content (reviews and review form if applicable).
Actual Result: Reviews tab expands and displays customer reviews and related controls.

Title: Verify that the Related products section is displayed on the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Scroll down to the bottom of the page
2. Observe the Related products section
Expected Result: Related products section is displayed at the bottom of the page with at least one related product.
Actual Result: Related products section is displayed at the bottom of the product page and shows relevant related items.

Title: Verify that the sale product detail page displays the SALE badge original price and discounted price
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the badge and pricing at the top of the product detail page
Expected Result: Sale product detail page shows SALE badge, original price crossed out, and discounted price displayed.
Actual Result: Sale product detail page displays the SALE badge, original price struck-through and the discounted price correctly.

Title: Verify that the variable product detail page displays Color and Size dropdowns
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the product options displayed on the page
Expected Result: Color dropdown and Size dropdown are displayed for variable products so customers can select variants.
Actual Result: Color and Size dropdowns are present on the variable product detail page and show available options.

Title: Verify that selecting a Color and Size option updates the product price
Preconditions: User is on the variable product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Select an option from each required product attribute dropdown
2. Observe the product details and pricing
Test Data:
Color: any available option
Size: any available option
Expected Result: Price updates to reflect the selected variant. Add to cart button becomes active.
Actual Result: Price updates to reflect the selected variant; Add to cart button becomes clickable.

Title: Verify that the Add to cart button is disabled when no variant is selected on a variable product
Preconditions: User is on the variable product detail page
Test Steps:
1. Do not select any required product variant
2. Click Add to Cart
3. Observe the result
Expected Result: Add to cart button is not clickable or a validation message is displayed prompting the user to select options.
Actual Result: Add to cart button remains disabled when no variant is selected and a validation message prompts selection.

Title: Verify that the external product displays a Buy on the WordPress swag store button
Preconditions: User is on second page of the shop
Test Steps: Observe an external product
Expected Result: External product displays a button labelled 'Buy on the WordPress swag store' which links externally.
Actual Result: External product displays the 'Buy on the WordPress swag store' button as expected.

Title: Verify that clicking the Buy on the WordPress swag store button opens an external link
Preconditions: User is on second page of the shop
Test Steps:
1. Click the external purchase button on the external product
2. Observe where the link leads
Expected Result: User is redirected to the WordPress swag store external website.
Actual Result: User is redirected to the WordPress swag store external website.

Title: Verify that clicking the category link on a product detail page navigates to the correct category page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product page
Test Steps:
1. Click a product category link
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the selected product category page and only products belonging to that category are displayed.
Actual Result: User was navigated to the selected category page and products displayed correspond to the selected category.
